prompt:
An adult oriental fantasy female character, dreamy and beautiful 3D CG high-precision rendering style, 9:16 vertical composition, sitting in front of a black grand piano quietly playing. The atmosphere of the picture is like a high-end fantasy movie poster, soft, romantic, ethereal, and exquisite.

The character is located on the right-center of the screen, in an elegant side-sitting posture, with a naturally narrowed waist and soft and stretched shoulder and neck lines. The sitting posture forms an obvious but natural S-shaped curve. The character's figure is plump and soft, mature and healthy, with natural and full chest-waist-hip proportions, overall showing high-end and restrained female beauty, with the upper contour of the chest visible, mainly with an elegant, soft, and dreamy temperament.

She has exquisite and soft oriental fantasy features, fair and transparent skin with a delicate texture and soft sub-surface scattering light. Her expression is quiet, gentle, and focused, slightly lowering her head to look at the piano keys, her eyes calm and dreamy. She has silver-white to light purple gradient extra-long soft hair, naturally falling on her shoulders, back, and chest, the strands light and delicate with soft mist highlights. A blue dreamy flower hair ornament is worn on the side of the ear, with small golden earrings.

The clothing is a light blue-purple fantasy dress made of thin layered gauze, with soft transparency and starlight particles, floating gauze sleeves on the shoulders and arms, and the skirt naturally spreading. The clothing fits the body but remains high-end and restrained, highlighting the soft female curves and plump figure without excessive exposure. The fabric has delicate pearlescent, light blue cold light, and a light stardust texture.

The scene is a dim and high-end classical music room. On the left is a black high-gloss lacquer grand piano with the lid open, reflecting window light and purple petals on its surface. The piano keys are clearly visible, her hands naturally placed on the keys, fingers slender and elegant, playing. The background has tall retro windows with soft cold white morning light coming through, and the interior has light fog, air dust, and dreamy halos.

A large number of purple petals fall slowly in the air, with blurred petals in the foreground and background, forming a strong sense of spatial layering. The overall color is dominated by the black piano, silver-white long hair, light blue-purple dress, purple petals, and cold white window light, with a high-end, dreamy, romantic, and quiet atmosphere. Soft light and shadow, with a faint blue-purple glow at the edges, cinematic depth of field, exquisite details, high-end fantasy illustration quality, super clear, 8K, high detail, cinematic lighting, soft focus, dreamy atmosphere, elegant fantasy, premium 3D CG render.
